description: Creates & assigns rules to a particular ruleset. Added or updated Rules will remain in draft state until their containing Rule Set is provisioned using the "illumio-object-provision" command.

outputs.description: URI of the user who has created the rule. Illumio.Rule.updated_by.href URI of the user who has updated the rule.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: URI of the user who has deleted the rule. Illumio.Rule.update_type Type of modification done on the rule.
outputs.name: Illumio.Rule.deleted_by

outputs.description: Description of the rule. Illumio.Rule.enabled Whether the rule is enabled or not.
outputs.name: Illumio.Rule.description

outputs.description: Providers label URI. Illumio.Rule.providers.actors All workloads.
outputs.name: Illumio.Rule.providers.label.href

outputs.description: Providers label group URI. Illumio.Rule.providers.virtual_server.href Providers virtual server URI.
outputs.name: Illumio.Rule.providers.label_group.href

outputs.description: Provider virtual service URI. Illumio.Rule.providers.ip_list.href Provider ip list URI.
outputs.name: Illumio.Rule.providers.virtual_service.href

outputs.description: Provider workload URI. Illumio.Rule.consumers.label.href Consumer label URI.
outputs.name: Illumio.Rule.providers.workload.href

outputs.description: Consumer label group URI. Illumio.Rule.consumers.actors All workloads.
outputs.name: Illumio.Rule.consumers.label_group.href

outputs.description: Consumer virtual service URI. Illumio.Rule.consumers.ip_list.href Consumer ip list URI.
outputs.name: Illumio.Rule.consumers.virtual_service.href

outputs.description: Consumer workload URI. Illumio.Rule.consumers.virtual_server.href Consumer virtual server URI.
outputs.name: Illumio.Rule.consumers.workload.href

outputs.description: URI of consuming security principals. Illumio.Rule.sec_connect Whether a secure connection is established or not.
outputs.name: Illumio.Rule.consuming_security_principals

outputs.description: Whether packet filtering is stateless for the rule or not. Illumio.Rule.machine_auth Whether machine authentication is enabled or not.
outputs.name: Illumio.Rule.stateless

outputs.description: Whether the scope for rule consumers is set to all or not. Illumio.Rule.network_type Network types to which this rule should apply to.
outputs.name: Illumio.Rule.unscoped_consumers

outputs.description: Array of service URI and port/protocol combinations. Illumio.Rule.resolve_labels_as.providers Providers resolve labels.
outputs.name: Illumio.Rule.ingress_services.href
